name: Razzle-Dazzle Berry Trifle
recipeIngredient: 1 package (5.1 oz) vanilla instant low-fat pudding/pie filling
1 cup Frozen reduced calorie whipped topping, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine boiling water and gelatin in a large bowl; stir until gelatin dissolves (about 2 minutes).
2. Add cold water and ice cubes, stirring until slightly thickened.
3. Remove any unmelted ice cubes.
4. Stir in bananas and blueberry pie filling; set aside.
5. Place cake cubes in a large bowl. Drizzle orange juice over cake cubes, and toss well.
6. Spoon gelatin mixture over the cake cubes; cover and chill 30 minutes.
7. Prepare pudding according to directions, using 2 1/2 cups of milk.
8. Fold whipped topping into the pudding, and spread over gelatin mixture.
9. Cover and chill.
10. Garnish with blueberries, raspberries, and mint if desired.
